summary: The video shows a highway with multiple lanes and vehicles traveling in both directions. A silver SUV overtakes the ego-vehicle from the left side, passing closely while maintaining speed. Other vehicles are seen further ahead on the road.

events_timeline.event: A silver SUV overtakes the ego-vehicle from the left side, passing closely while maintaining speed.

uncertainties: Speed of the silver SUV relative to the ego-vehicle is unclear.
Exact distance between the silver SUV and the ego-vehicle during overtaking is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of a collision or hazardous interaction between the ego-vehicle and the silver SUV. The overtaking maneuver appears routine and controlled.
